title: Get Back to Dancing: 11 Herbal Creams for Dancers with Jaw Lock
description: Boswellia serrata creams are a popular remedy for jaw lock, also known as temporomandibular joint (TMJ) disorder. The reason Boswellia serrata creams are effective is due to the presence of boswellic acids, which have potent anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. These acids, specifically AKBA (acetyl-11-keto-beta-boswellic acid), are responsible for reducing swelling and pain in the jaw joint. When applied topically as a cream, these boswellic acids are absorbed directly into the...
